taxon.author: Lissner,
taxon.distribution: Central America (presumably Costa Rica). Imported to Denmark

referenceObject.reference: Lissner, J. & Craig, S. B. B. (2023). A new Masteria (Araneae: Dipluridae) from tropical hothouses in Denmark. Arachnology 19(6): 888-893. doi: 10.13156/arac.2023.19.6.888
